name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a bug or incorrect behavior in the app

labels: bug

> ⚠️ **Before fixing:** please read [`rule.md`](../../rule.md) first — it defines this project's
> architecture conventions (page.tsx/hooks/components split, API route per feature, README update),
> React/Hooks best practices, Supabase/DB rules, and the Git branching workflow (branch naming,
> `Closes #<issue-number>` in commit message, PRs must target `release` — never `main`).
